mapper.select: SELECT log_id, user_id, action, details, ip_address, created_at FROM system_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT log_id, user_id, action, details, ip_address, created_at FROM system_logs WHERE action = #{action} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT log_id, user_id, action, details, ip_address, created_at FROM system_logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT log_id, user_id, action, details, ip_address, created_at FROM system_logs WHERE ip_address = #{ipAddress} ORDER BY created_at DESC
